generated_oml:
instance SysMLDerivedModelMatlabSimulink : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computational model derived from SysML structural and logical architecture, implemented in Simulink; it simulates detailed behavioral dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkExecutionEngine
]

instance SimulinkExecutionEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Execution engine that runs the Simulink model, bridging C++ or Java implementation layers to the simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulatedBehaviorService
]

instance SimulatedBehaviorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that provides simulated behavioral outputs from the SysML-derived Simulink model."
    DTDFVocab:provides InsightSimulationOutput
]

instance InsightSimulationOutput : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the system’s dynamic behavior predicted by the Simulink simulation."
]
